approach: Certified residual-SAT exclusion for the record-21 frozen order-30 core after blocking all eight supplied-class boundary vectors
summary: The exact record-21 residual formula contains 196998 Ramsey clauses, 1914 row-lex clauses, and 8 supplied-class blocks. CaDiCaL proved it UNSAT in 3.802 seconds. Two separately invoked fresh builds of pinned drat-trim verified the 2728822-byte proof. This is a rigorous propositional exclusion of one narrow frozen-core quotient, not a new Ramsey bound. Full independent semantic census replay remains incomplete at 7/656 hosts.
rationale: Exact reconstruction agreement, corruption controls, a retained physical CNF, and two proof checks support the scoped UNSAT conclusion. Incomplete cold census replay and absent external usefulness prevent candidate promotion.
claims: The physical CNF with SHA-256 cb3347f62affdb58e2c018fd156429165724ed1fc1375b17f7cdf20c85c81d54 is UNSAT.
That CNF represents only the record-21 frozen order-30 core, S12 row-lex quotient, and eight exact supplied-class blocks.
No conclusion about R(5,5) or all order-42 Ramsey graphs follows from this exclusion.
evidence: Preflight: 196998 raw Ramsey clauses + 1914 lex clauses + 8 blocks; all three mutations rejected.
Production drat-trim: s VERIFIED in 2.544180 seconds.
Fresh cold drat-trim: s VERIFIED in 2.482 seconds.
Cold semantic replay: hosts 0..6 reproduced; checkpoint next_host=7.
next_steps: Create a lab wrapper that mirrors the unchanged auditor checkpoint into standard progress JSON without changing the auditor hash.
Resume cold replay from host 7 and require all 656 hosts, physical DIMACS equality, and final cold drat-trim verification.
If validation completes, ask an R(5,5) specialist whether this fixed-core exclusion materially benefits an accepted search.
experiments: .proof-experiments/20260722-040756-4a31ae: preflight passed with exact counts and three rejected mutations
.proof-experiments/20260722-041055-58db63: UNSAT in 3.802 seconds; production proof check passed
.proof-experiments/20260722-041214-e6c3af: independently rebuilt drat-trim returned s VERIFIED
.proof-experiments/20260722-041240-f41777: cold replay timed out as declared after checkpointing next_host=7
transfer_insights: Certificate-carrying SAT exclusions -> compact fixed-core boundary -> rapid verified UNSAT
Graph-label symmetry -> sorted residual core-neighbourhood rows -> covering S12 quotient
Census deduplication -> exact assignment blocks -> 12 occurrences compressed to 8 clauses

established_facts.scope: Status checked through the April 24, 2026 survey revision

established_facts.claim: The blocked record-21 fixed-core row-lex CNF is UNSAT.
established_facts.evidence: CNF cb3347f6…d54 and DRAT a0f0e2e6…e231, verified twice

established_facts.claim: Cold semantic replay agrees through canonical host 6.

ruled_out.claim_or_route: A ninth or otherwise unblocked completion exists in the represented record-21 frozen-core row-lex boundary family.
ruled_out.scope: The exact physical CNF after eight supplied-vector blocks
ruled_out.evidence: DRAT proof a0f0e2e6…e231 and two s VERIFIED checks
ruled_out.reopen_condition: A demonstrated mismatch in CNF generation, proof checking, block semantics, or symmetry coverage

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Promote the result as fully cold-validated now.
ruled_out.reason: Fresh semantic replay covers only 7 of 656 hosts.
ruled_out.evidence: cold-audit coverage checkpoint next_host=7 and absent final audit JSON
ruled_out.reopen_condition: Complete all 656 host replays and final cold formula/proof audit

open_leads.description: Complete the cold all-host audit from its hash-bound host-7 checkpoint.
open_leads.rationale: This is the only missing internal validation step for the scoped fixed-core exclusion.
open_leads.next_experiment: Run the unchanged cold auditor in a writable checkpointed lab with a progress-mirroring wrapper.

open_leads.description: Deletion-minimize one distance-3 two-orbit raw K5-origin core.
open_leads.rationale: It is a structurally different fallback if the cold audit or external usefulness gate fails.
open_leads.next_experiment: Run duplicate-preserving minimization and stop unless the exact core has at most 20 origins.

strategy_proposals.family: proof-core compression for structured Ramsey exclusions
strategy_proposals.mechanism: Deletion-minimize raw K5-clause cores and canonicalize their signed incidence hypergraphs across two-orbit slices.
strategy_proposals.hypothesis: At least one certified slice has a duplicate-preserving obstruction core with at most 20 origins.
strategy_proposals.discriminating_test: Run exact deletion minimization on the predeclared distance-3 slice and stop above 20 origins.
strategy_proposals.rationale: A concise obstruction template may have greater structural and external value than another isolated fixed-core SAT exclusion.

strategy.mechanism: Freeze a 30-vertex core, quotient the twelve residual labels by row-lex order, block eight validated 426-bit supplied-class assignments, and verify UNSAT with DRAT

continuation.objective: Independently validate the complete fixed-core UNSAT packet.
continuation.first_action: Implement a wrapper around checkers/known_class_residual_sat_audit.py that mirrors next_host from artifacts/known-class-residual-sat-epoch20/cold-audit.json.coverage-checkpoint.json into lab progress JSON, then submit the unchanged auditor resuming at host 7.
continuation.stop_condition: Stop on any hash or semantic mismatch; validate only at next_host=656 with final physical DIMACS equality and cold drat-trim s VERIFIED.

candidate_profile.scholarly_question: Can a natural frozen order-30 boundary of Ramsey(5,5,42) be exhaustively classified after supplied known classes are removed?
candidate_profile.meaningful_delta: A certificate-carrying UNSAT classification of one record-21 fixed-core row-lex residual family.
candidate_profile.acceptance_test: Complete cold semantic replay, final independent proof audit, and confirmation that a specialist search can use the exclusion.

closest_prior_work.difference: Prior work generated and extended known order-42 classes; it did not publish this fixed-core blocked CNF/DRAT classification.
Analog Max-SAT searched broadly for low-conflict graphs rather than proving this exact frozen-core exclusion.

novelty_searches.source: Electronic Journal of Combinatorics Dynamic Survey
novelty_searches.finding: The 2026 survey retains the 43–46 range and 656-class conjecture; no matching fixed-core certificate was identified.

novelty_searches.query: largest known Ramsey(5,5) graphs and supplied corpus
novelty_searches.finding: The page supplies 328 graphs plus complements and explicitly does not claim completeness.

external_channel.acceptance_path: After full cold validation, provide the compact CNF/DRAT packet and ask whether the frozen-core exclusion is useful to an active R(5,5) search.

campaign_assessment.reason: The SAT route was decisive, but the remaining cold replay cannot responsibly be replaced by repeated local prefixes while durable lab state is unavailable.

search_efficiency.naive_space: The ambient labelled K42 universe has 2^861 graphs; the selected fixed-core boundary has 2^426 primary assignments before Ramsey and row-lex constraints.
reductions_considered: S12 residual-label symmetry quotient by sorted 30-bit core-neighbourhood rows
one batched CNF retaining learned clauses
cube-and-conquer, rejected until the one-solve runtime was measured
cheap width, hash, timing, and corruption prefilters
search_efficiency.chosen_mechanism: A single row-lex CNF with eight globally unique exact assignment blocks and one proof-logging solve.
search_efficiency.estimated_or_measured_savings: Vector deduplication reduced 12 occurrences to 8 clauses, a 33.3% reduction; the solver finished in 3.802 seconds.
search_efficiency.soundness_guard: Independent formula reconstruction, three corruption sentinels, two fresh drat-trim invocations, and a separately written cold auditor; the latter has replayed only hosts 0..6 so far.

space_reduction.represented_space_before: {x in {0,1}^426 : record-21 frozen-core Ramsey clauses and S12 row-lex clauses hold}
space_reduction.eliminated_or_quotiented: All assignments remaining after eight exact supplied-class boundary vectors were blocked
space_reduction.represented_space_after: 0 satisfying assignments for the blocked fixed-core CNF
space_reduction.reduction_factor: complete elimination of the represented blocked family; no global numeric factor claimed
space_reduction.coverage_scope: Record-21 frozen order-30 core with deleted vertices {2,3,10,12,14,25,27,30,36,37,38,41}, under the S12 row-lex quotient
space_reduction.soundness_basis: The physical CNF and 2728822-byte DRAT proof were verified twice; row sorting preserves the frozen core and Ramsey property.
space_reduction.remaining_unknown: Graphs with other order-30 cores, global completeness of the supplied 656 classes, and full cold semantic validation of the census.
space_reduction.next_bulk_elimination: Complete the hash-bound cold replay of the remaining 649 supplied hosts, then assess whether additional frozen cores form a useful cover.

tactical_learning.prediction: The blocked formula would yield a checked SAT candidate, checked fixed-core UNSAT certificate, or bounded UNKNOWN.
tactical_learning.observation: CaDiCaL returned UNSAT in 3.802 seconds; two drat-trim runs returned s VERIFIED.
tactical_learning.surprise: The formula was decisively UNSAT far below the 60-second pilot cap.
tactical_learning.failure_signature: Independent semantic census validation remains incomplete even when the propositional proof is valid.
tactical_learning.bottleneck_update: The limiting operation is now the 656-host cold VF2/tied-row replay and unavailable durable lab-state write access, not SAT solving.

constraints_learned.constraint: The blocked record-21 row-lex residual CNF is UNSAT.
constraints_learned.scope: Exactly 745 variables and 198920 clauses bound by CNF SHA-256 cb3347f6…d54

constraints_learned.constraint: The supplied census contributes 12 vector occurrences but only 8 unique 426-bit blocks.

tactical_learning.next_discriminator: Resume the cold auditor from next_host=7 in a writable checkpointed lab and require completion through host 655 plus final physical-CNF and DRAT checks.

prior_art_check.exact_delta: Prior work generated and extended order-42 graphs; this route classifies one frozen-core boundary quotient by exact supplied-vector blocking and a certificate-carrying SAT exclusion.
prior_art_check.duplicate_risk: The narrow fixed-core exclusion may already be implicit in unpublished searches or may lack external utility despite using a different mechanism.
prior_art_check.comparison_test: Ask whether the certified frozen-core boundary is consumed by or measurably shrinks a current specialist R(5,5) search.

field_progress_assessment.gate_id: Produce certified exclusions that materially shrink an accepted R(5,5) search space, with deterministic encodings, checked proof logs, and sound symmetry coverage.
field_progress_assessment.closest_prior_result: McKay and Radziszowski's 656 supplied order-42 classes and their nonextension searches
field_progress_assessment.measurable_improvement: One exact frozen-core row-lex boundary is UNSAT after eight blocks; external search-space utility is not established.
field_progress_assessment.independent_validation: Physical proof independently rechecked, but fresh census semantic replay is only 7/656 hosts.
field_progress_assessment.remains_unproved: Global completeness of the 656 classes, any improved Ramsey bound, and material usefulness of this fixed-core exclusion.
field_progress_assessment.route_recommendation: continue only after completing cold validation; then seek specialist utility review before promotion

lab_review.reason: Submission failed before activation because the sandbox could not write /root/proof-factory/state/labs/jobs; no lab job ID exists.
evidence: Cold replay instead stopped locally at its 115-second bound with next_host=7

hypothesis: After blocking all eight boundary vectors induced by the validated supplied 656-class corpus, no Ramsey(5,5,42) completion remains in the record-21 frozen-core S12 row-lex quotient.
discriminating_test: Construct the exact 745-variable, 198920-clause CNF and run one seed-1 CaDiCaL solve, accepting UNSAT only after two drat-trim checks.
independent_checker: A separately written cold auditor reconstructs the formula without importing producer code, and a second fresh drat-trim build verified the physical proof. Its all-host semantic census replay is incomplete at 7/656.
blocker: The full 656-host semantic replay needs checkpointed compute, but this sandbox cannot write the lab's durable state directory; external usefulness also remains unconfirmed.
reopen_condition: Restore writable lab-state submission, resume the bound cold checkpoint, and obtain a final audit covering all 656 hosts with physical-CNF equality and s VERIFIED.
tool_disclosure: GPT-5.6 Sol served as principal investigator. A supplied GPT-5.6 Terra experiment-verification memo was advisory and promoted with provenance; Sol independently reproduced every relied-on computation. No subagent was spawned. Deterministic tools: Python 3.12.3, NetworkX 3.3, CaDiCaL 1.7.3, GCC/cc 13.3.0, drat-trim pinned to 2e3b2dc0ecf938addbd779d42877b6ed69d9a985, nauty tools, SHA-256, exact Python/C graph checkers, and the computational-researcher experiment harness.; orchestration: gpt-5.6-sol principal with gpt-5.6-terra delegates.

json_repair.policy: serialization-only; protected outcome and classification fields must remain unchanged
